title: [BOUNTY $100] HOOK: Pre-tool-use hook that blocks destructive bash commands
body:
## 💰 Bounty: $100 — powered by [Opire](https://opire.dev)

## Description
Create a Claude Code `pre-tool-use` hook in Python or bash that intercepts
dangerous bash commands before they are executed.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Hook follows Claude Code hooks format (`~/.claude/hooks/`)
- [ ] Blocks these patterns: `rm -rf`, `DROP TABLE`, `git push --force`,
      `TRUNCATE`, `DELETE FROM` without a WHERE clause
- [ ] Logs every blocked attempt to `~/.claude/hooks/blocked.log`
      with: timestamp, attempted command, project path
- [ ] Displays a clear message to Claude explaining why the command was blocked
- [ ] Does not interfere with normal bash commands
- [ ] README with installation in 2 commands or fewer

## How to Claim
1. Comment `/opire try` in this issue
2. Submit a PR with the hook + README
3. Payment is released automatically on merge ✅

## Resources
- Claude Code hooks docs: https://docs.anthropic.com/claude-code/hooks

title: [CAMPAIGN] 5,000 Stars Drive — Earn Up to 430 RTC (5,000 RTC Pool)
body:
## 5,000 Stars Campaign

**Pool: 5,000 RTC ($500 value)** | Currently at **337 stars** across 86 repos — need **4,663 more**.

```
[██░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░] 6.7% (337/5000)
```

### Earn RTC by Starring

| Repos Starred | RTC Per Star | Max Payout |
|---------------|-------------|------------|
| 1-2 | 1 RTC | 2 RTC |
| 3-4 | 1.5 RTC | 6 RTC |
| 5-9 | 2 RTC | 18 RTC |
| 10-19 | 2.5 RTC | 50 RTC |
| 20-49 | 3 RTC | 150 RTC |
| **ALL 86 repos** | **5 RTC** | **430 RTC** |

### Social Amplifier Bonus

| Action | Bonus |
|--------|-------|
| Tweet + link | +5 RTC |
| Dev.to / Medium article | +15 RTC |
| Reddit post | +10 RTC |
| HN submission | +25 RTC |

### See All Repos + Live Progress

**[rustchain.org/stars](https://rustchain.org/stars.html)** — One page with all 86 repos, live star counts, progress bar, and reward calculator.

### Full Bounty Details

**[rustchain-bounties#478](https://github.com/Scottcjn/rustchain-bounties/issues/478)** — Complete rules, referral bonuses, milestone rewards.

### How to Claim

1. Star repos at [rustchain.org/stars](https://rustchain.org/stars.html)
2. Reply here or on [#478](https://github.com/Scottcjn/rustchain-bounties/issues/478) with:
   - GitHub username
   - Number of repos starred
   - RTC wallet (`pip install clawrtc && clawrtc wallet create`)

---

*Why 5K? We're working to qualify for the Claude Code Open Source program. Every star counts.*
